## Scope

- [ ] Backend
- [ ] Frontend
- [ ] Docs/runbook

## Validation

- [ ] `git diff --check`
- [ ] Backend tests relevant to touched packages
- [ ] Frontend typecheck/tests relevant to touched packages
- [ ] `project.json` validates if modified
- [ ] No live secrets, tokens, cookies, dumps, or credential screenshots were added

## Runtime / Consumer Impact

- Public endpoint changed: yes/no
- Port changed: yes/no
- Group/account/key behavior changed: yes/no
- Mortis / Telegram / n8n / FuckVideo consumer config changed: yes/no
